title: マイルCSの後に・ポカポカ大勝利！

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Phew!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Akebono... I... I!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I lost, and that really stings! But despite all that...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I had a real blast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what power... Bono really took the cake out
there! I can't believe what a tour de force she was!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't even blink! Watching her was just so
invigorating!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Bono! Hishi Akebono! You're the
beeest!

text_block_list.name: Taiki's Fan A
text_block_list.text: Sniffle! She didn't win, but what a race! You've inspired me so much! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wow, wow!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
The soup's sizzling, the broth's bubbling, and
everyone's smiling... And I...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm so fuuull!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Taiki! And thank you, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I had so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Look!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono points, and I turn to see what she's
talking about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see fans getting riled to a frenzy in the stands
and breathless racers wiping sweat from their
faces.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: They're all piping hot and so full!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You know, I really... I just—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I did!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono grins and leaps over the railing in
front of the stands...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Upsy-daisy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And tosses me high into the air!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Below me, I see a sea of cheering fans and the
faces of all the disappointed yet satisfied racers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do a single twist in midair, and plop safely into a
big set of open arms.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Ch. comes to a close with me in Hishi
Akebono's warm bear hug and surrounded by
cheers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, the phrase "Hishi Akebono's Trainer in
Flight" starts trending online. But only a little.
